steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage calls these entries "hoaxes perpetrated as jokes by mischievous users." The blank is what the entries were finally recognized as before being deleted — it must mean the same thing: deceptive jokes.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
A. Enhancements means improvements or additions that add value. Fake entries created by mischievous users improve nothing — they are deceptive, not beneficial. Eliminated.

B. Pranks means tricks or jokes played on others. Substituting: "finally recognized as pranks and deleted" — this matches the passage's own description of these entries as hoaxes and jokes. B is correct.

C. Revelations means surprising new discoveries or disclosures. Fake entries about nonexistent bands and legislators reveal nothing true. Eliminated.

D. Analyses means systematic examinations or studies. A fictitious entry for a made-up punk band is not an analysis of anything. Eliminated.
